name: Second Time Around Veal Stew Marengo Style (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté the mushrooms in butter until they are soft.
2. Add the ground orange zest and chopped tomatoes with white wine to the saucepan.
3. Reduce the mixture by simmering it until it thickens.
4. Incorporate the veal stew into the saucepan and bring it to a gentle simmer.
5. Stir in the sliced green olives and season the dish with salt and pepper to taste.
